---
title: "standerlize folders"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
jupyter: python3
---
```{python}
import os
os.chdir("..")
```

```{python}
import polars as pl
import pandas as pd
import requests
from src.jp_imports.src.jp_imports.data_process import DataTrade
```


```{python}
d = DataTrade("postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5433/timescaledb")
d.process_price()
```

```{python}
pd.DataFrame(r)
